title: Reflections and attentiveness on eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI): The journey ahead from criticisms to human–AI collaboration
description_es: Este trabajo proporciona una reflexión profunda y crítica sobre el estado actual de la IA explicable, analizando desafíos, oportunidades y direcciones futuras.
abstract: Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) has emerged as a critical field addressing the opacity of complex AI models. This comprehensive reflection explores XAI from multiple perspectives, examining its role in human-AI collaboration, addressing criticisms, and proposing frameworks for evaluating XAI maturity across practical, auditable, and governance dimensions.

citations.apa: Herrera, F. (2025). Reflections and attentiveness on eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI): The journey ahead from criticisms to human–AI collaboration. Information Fusion, 121, 103133.
citations.mla: Herrera, Francisco. "Reflections and attentiveness on eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI): The journey ahead from criticisms to human–AI collaboration." Information Fusion, vol. 121, 2025, p. 103133.
